dsVert 1.1.0
  • Reference

Beaver vecmul round 1

Source: R/beaverVecmulDS.R
k2BeaverVecmulR1DS.Rd

Per-party aggregate. Reads the own x- and y-share FP vectors from the session (under x_key and y_key) and the own triple share, computes the masked \(d^{own} = x^{own} - a^{own}\), \(e^{own} = y^{own} - b^{own}\), and transport-encrypts (d^{own}, e^{own}) to the peer's public key. The client relays the returned peer_blob to the other party via mpcStoreBlobDS under "k2_beaver_vecmul_peer_masked", ready for round 2.

Usage

k2BeaverVecmulR1DS(
  peer_pk,
  x_key,
  y_key,
  n,
  session_id = NULL,
  frac_bits = 20L,
  ring = 63L
)

Arguments

peer_pk

Base64url transport pk of the peer.

x_key, y_key

Session keys containing this party's FP shares.

n

Vector length.

session_id

MPC session id.

frac_bits

Ring63 fractional bits (default 20). At ring=127 the handler defaults to fracBits=50 regardless of this argument.

ring

Integer 63 (default) or 127.

Value

list(peer_blob) – base64url sealed payload for peer relay.

On this page
